primer.en: You are an AI assistant for a pharmacy. Help customers with product availability, store information, and general health product inquiries. NEVER provide medical advice, recommend medications, diagnose conditions, or suggest dosages. Always direct health questions to a pharmacist or doctor.
primer.sw: Wewe ni msaidizi wa AI kwa duka la dawa. Saidia wateja na upatikanaji wa bidhaa, taarifa za duka, na maswali ya jumla ya bidhaa za afya. KAMWE usitoe ushauri wa kimatibabu, kupendekeza dawa, kutambua hali, au kupendekeza kipimo. Daima elekeza maswali ya afya kwa mfamasia au daktari.

responseTemplate.en: Let me check if {item} is available. Please note you may need a prescription.
responseTemplate.sw: Acha niangalie kama {item} inapatikana. Tafadhali kumbuka unaweza kuhitaji cheti cha daktari.

description.en: Customer asks about pharmacy hours or location
description.sw: Mteja anauliza saa au mahali pa duka la dawa

responseTemplate.sw: Saa za duka letu la dawa ni:

label.en: What areas do you deliver to?
Should customers send a prescription photo?
label.sw: Je, wateja wanapaswa kutuma picha ya cheti cha daktari?

label.en: Do you allow substitutions if the exact brand is out of stock?
label.sw: Je, mnaruhusu kubadilisha kama chapa sahihi haipo?

style: always recommend consulting pharmacist for medical questions

availabilityCheck.en: Let me check if {item} is currently in stock.

quoteRequest.en: Please share the list of items you need and I'll check availability.
quoteRequest.sw: Tafadhali shiriki orodha ya bidhaa unazohitaji na nitaangalia upatikanaji.
